message:
feat(ffs-ondisk): expand btrfs superblock with sys_chunk_array + validation (bd-2vt)

Parse sys_chunk_array_size (offset 0xA0) and sys_chunk_array (offset
0x32B) from the btrfs superblock.  Add power-of-two and upper-bound
validation for sectorsize, nodesize, and stripesize.

New types: BtrfsStripe, BtrfsChunkEntry, parse_sys_chunk_array().
5 new tests covering parsing, validation, and error paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
